name: route-sheet
description: Plan-time executor routing for Claude Code: route each unit of multi-unit work to Codex, a local model, a cheap Claude tier, or the coordinator, per a constraint-aware policy.

enable_session_status.title: Enable the router session-status line
enable_session_status.description: Inject a one-line Model Router status (active/disabled plus model-catalog staleness) at session start. Off by default; the router's skills work whether or not this is on.
